series_metadata.series_description: Answer Sheets for licensure examinations developed and produced by the Medical Board, and administered to limited branch applicants. Pool of questions from which limited branch examinations are created. Licensure examination booklets developed and produced by the Board, and administered to limited branch applicants. Grade reports and psychometrics pertaining to the limited branch examinations which are prepared at the Ohio State University.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned to electronic medium for storage and scan is checked for accuracy; then destroy. If not scanned, retain for five years after date of examination, then destroy if not subject to litigation; if subject to litigation, retain for three years after litigation and related appeals have terminated, or for five years, whichever is longer, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for five years after date of examination, if not subject to litigation; if subject to litigation, retain for three years after litigation and related appeals have terminated, or for five years, whichever is longer, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
